title: Botany Ores
description: Allows you to grow ores in Botany Pots.
body:
This mod adds functionality to the popular [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots) mod, allowing you to harness the power of botany to grow ores like never before. This mod is not apart of the DarkHax ecosystem and is completely made and maintained by myself. ## Features * 5 New Soil Types * 1 New Fertilizer * Tiered Progression * Grow Every Ore * Grow Obsidian and Blaze Powder * Mod Support * Planned Updates ## Soil
Spoilers
Tier 1 Soil: Coal Soil | 1.5x Speed Tier 2 Soil: Iron Soil | 3x Speed Tier 3 Soil: Diamond Soil | 4.5x Speed Tier 4 Soil: Netherite Soil | 6x Speed Tier ? Soil: Creative Soil | 25x Speed All soil is made by surrounding a block of dirt with the respective block of smelted ore.
## Growables
Spoilers
All growables are tiered and requires the respective tier of soil or higher to be grown.
### Vanilla Minecraft #### Tier 1 Coal (Requires Coal Ore to be grown)
Copper (Requires Copper Ore to be grown)
Iron (Requires Iron Ore to be grown)
#### Tier 2 Gold (Requires Gold Ore to be grown)
Lapis Lazuli (Requires Lapis Lazuli Ore to be grown)
Redstone (Requires Redstone Ore to be grown)
Glowstone (Requires Glowstone Dust to be grown)
#### Tier 3 Diamond (Requires Diamond Ore to be grown)
Emerald (Requires Emerald Ore to be grown)
Nether Quartz (Requires Nether Quartz Ore to be grown)
#### Tier 4 Blaze Powder (Requires Blaze Rod to be grown)
Netherite (Requires Netherite Ingots to be grown)
Obsidian (Requires Obisdian to be grown)


### Tech Reborn #### Tier 1 None
#### Tier 2 Bauxite (Requires Bauxite Ore to be grown)
Cinnabar (Requires Cinnabar Ore to be grown)
Lead (Requires Lead Ore to be grown)
Pyrite (Requires Pyrite Ore to be grown)
Ruby (Requires Ruby Ore to be grown)
Sapphire (Requires Sapphire Ore to be grown)
Silver (Requires Silver Ore to be grown)
Tin (Requires Tin Ore to be grown)
#### Tier 3 Galena (Requires Galena Ore to be grown)
Iridium (Requires Iridium Ore to be grown)
Peridot (Requires Peridot Ore to be grown)
Sheldonite (Requires Sheldonite Ore to be grown)
Sodalite (Requires Sodalite Ore to be grown)
Sphalerite (Requires Sphalerite Ore to be grown)
Tungsten (Requires Tungsten Ore to be grown)
#### Tier 4 None
## Planned Updates
Spoilers
### BetterEnd Support ### BetterNether Support
